_doc: Single source of truth for SITL mission orchestration. Every tests/missions/*.toml must have an entry here and vice versa (scripts/check_mission_manifest.py enforces the bijection). gate=blocking: runs in the required CI shard lane and feeds CI Success. gate=quarantined: runs visibly in the non-blocking quarantine lane on pushes to main and must link a tracking issue; quarantine is never a passing gate. gate=manual: run on demand for evidence campaigns and must state a reason. runs/pass_threshold define each mission's reliability bar.

attitude_control.reason: open-loop thrust sequence overshoots its own level_hover altitude expectation; needs profile recalibration before it can gate

closed_loop_landing.reason: strict-lane witness; adjudicated through the mission-quality campaign, not the per-PR gate

hover_trim_check.reason: hover-trim measurement harness, run on demand for actuator-domain evidence

rotated_course.reason: rotated-heading soak evidence for the PositionHold family, run on demand

square_course.reason: course-tracking tolerances not yet adjudicated against the strict lane

two_vehicle_formation.reason: needs a multi-instance spawner that gcs-test does not drive; single-vehicle harness cannot execute it
